title: Prepared a GitHub awesome-list addition for Ralph Workflow on ai-for-developers/awesome-ai-coding-tools, but external submission was blocked by missing GitHub authentication

details.proposed_entry: - **[Ralph Workflow](https://codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow)** – Open-source autonomous coding loop framework with multi-agent execution, durable schedules, memory, messaging connectors, and Codeberg-primary self-hosting workflows.
details.blocking_issue: gh auth status shows no GitHub login, and direct git push to GitHub failed with username/auth prompt
